name: interview-codex
description: Portable Socratic interview core and Codex skill extracted from Ouroboros.

interface.shortDescription: Portable Socratic interview workflow for clarifying vague requirements.
interface.longDescription: Extracted from Ouroboros as a portable subset. Provides a Codex skill for Socratic requirement interviews plus a reusable Python core for ambiguity scoring, transcript state, and prompt-driven question generation.
defaultPrompt: Use the portable interview skill to clarify vague requirements before implementation.
